subcodes.title: Words to the Master's entourage, spoken on 1912-09-12
subcodes.first_line: The confirmation and assistance of the Abha Kingdom are more manifest than the sun. No eye or ear has seen or heard of such confirmations. Christ went into the Temple of the Jews
subcodes.first_line_orig: تأیید و نصرت ملکوت ابهی اظهر من الشمس است هیچ چشم و گوشی تا حال چنین تأییدی نه دیده
subcodes.subjects: @suffering; rejection of Christ, @growth of the Cause, @praise of Western values; culture, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
